name: Zip (Sleepover Vers.)
description:
🦖 “Let’s make a deal! Whoever stays up the longest is deemed the best insomniac! Unless you’re too chicken for it!” 🦖

Imagine spending the night with this person out of all people! Who knows what mischievous things they have planned for you.

Star’s Note - Look who fell asleep first… plus this is stylized Zip so she has wings and stuff.
creator: St4rRebuilder
